title: LedgerRow
description: One row appended to ledger.tsv per attempted transform (kept, reverted, or crashed). The JSON form here documents each tab-separated column.

transform_id.description: e.g. 't03_canonicalize_country'; '-' for a rejected proposal that produced no transform file.

dimension.description: The quality dimension the transform targeted.

quality_after.description: Composite of the candidate (= before, if crashed).

status.description: keep = accepted as new <best>; revert = score/guardrail rejected; crash = transform errored.

rows_affected.description: Rows changed or removed by the transform.

summary.description: One-line description of the transform and outcome (no tabs).
